assertions.title: Rank presentation is truthful instead of placeholder copy

steps.expected: Rank copy is truthful and not a placeholder
steps.observed: Match cards render match.rankLabel and the implementation uses 'Rank unavailable for this match'.

steps.action: Run focused tests for match reconstruction
steps.expected: Automated coverage asserts truthful rank fallback copy
steps.observed: lib/match-reconstruction.test.ts passed and explicitly asserted rankLabel === 'Rank unavailable for this match'.

assertions.title: Match cards show enriched metadata consistently

steps.expected: Cards show impact category plus played-at time, duration, role/lane, and damage metadata
steps.observed: Card badges render impactCategoryLabel, 'Played {match.playedAt}', 'Duration …', roleLabel, and damageToChampionsLabel alongside core stats.

steps.expected: Automated coverage proves the metadata fields are populated or truthfully fall back
steps.observed: lib/match-reconstruction.test.ts passed and asserted durationSeconds, roleLabel, damageToChampionsLabel, impactCategoryLabel, and playedAt/rank fallback labels.

evidence.consoleErrors: blocked by browser-tooling exception; no browser console available in approved fallback mode
evidence.network: Enriched card fields are assembled from reconstructed match summaries rather than a separate metadata request.
evidence.terminal: Focused vitest run passed; code inspection confirms rendered badges for playedAt, duration, roleLabel, and damageToChampionsLabel.

assertions.title: Each match card exposes a clear details affordance

steps.action: Inspect the match-card details toggle implementation
steps.expected: A visible per-card control opens and closes details only for that card
steps.observed: Each MatchCard has its own isDetailsOpen state and a button labeled 'View match details' / 'Hide match details'.

steps.expected: Closing preserves surrounding dashboard context and only toggles that card's details region
steps.observed: handleToggleDetails toggles local state inside the memoized MatchCard component; no route or global dashboard state is changed when opening/closing details.

evidence.consoleErrors: blocked by browser-tooling exception; no browser console available in approved fallback mode
evidence.network: Opening details calls BackendBridge.getMatchDetails(match.id, currentPuuid) only for the selected card.
evidence.terminal: Source evidence from components/dashboard/lol-stats-dashboard.tsx lines around the MatchCard toggle logic.

assertions.title: Match details show both teams with useful per-player context

steps.expected: Details view shows both teams, per-player comparison context, and a current-player marker
steps.observed: The details view maps teams into a two-column layout, renders participant rows with summoner, champion, role, KDA, vision, and damage, and marks the current player with a 'You' badge plus highlighted styling.

steps.expected: Automated coverage asserts team summaries, participant fields, and current-player highlighting data
steps.observed: lib/match-details.test.ts passed and asserted teams for both sides plus participant fields including roleLabel, damageToChampionsLabel, and isCurrentPlayer: true.

evidence.consoleErrors: blocked by browser-tooling exception; no browser console available in approved fallback mode
evidence.network: GET /api/match-details?matchId=NA1_1&userPuuid=puuid-1 returned a truthful details payload shape from the running dev server.
evidence.terminal: Focused vitest run passed; curl to /api/match-details returned JSON with status 'unavailable' fallback schema when raw data was absent.

assertions.title: Match details fail gracefully when raw detail data is unavailable

steps.expected: A truthful fallback is scoped to the match details region
steps.observed: MatchDetailsFallback renders 'Match details unavailable' and the details.statusLabel inside the card details region.

steps.expected: When raw data is missing, the endpoint returns a truthful unavailable payload instead of crashing
steps.observed: curl to /api/match-details?matchId=NA1_1&userPuuid=puuid-1 returned status 'unavailable' with statusLabel 'Full match details are unavailable because cached raw match data has not been saved for this match yet.'

steps.expected: Automated coverage asserts the missing-raw-data fallback
steps.observed: lib/match-details.test.ts passed and asserted the exact unavailable fallback payload.

evidence.consoleErrors: blocked by browser-tooling exception; no browser console available in approved fallback mode
evidence.terminal: Focused vitest run passed including lib/match-details.test.ts and app/api/match-details/route.test.ts.

assertions.title: Search-to-details flow works end to end

steps.action: Exercise the deterministic validation fixture through the runtime search/account path
steps.expected: A searchable Riot ID resolves to the fixture player identity used for fallback end-to-end proof
steps.observed: curl to /api/account?gameName=Validation%20Fixture&tagLine=LOCAL returned 200 with puuid validation-fixture-puuid and the expected Riot ID.

steps.action: Verify the player route and enriched match-card data for the fixture player
steps.expected: The player route responds and the stored-matches path returns enriched cards for the same player context
steps.observed: HEAD /player/Validation%20Fixture#LOCAL returned 200, and /api/stored-matches?puuid=validation-fixture-puuid returned two enriched cards with impact category, played-at copy, duration, role, and damage metadata.

steps.action: Open both the ready-details and truthful fallback-details fixture cases through the live runtime route
steps.expected: At least one match returns full details while another returns a scoped unavailable fallback without losing the player context path
steps.observed: /api/match-details?matchId=VALIDATION_READY_001&userPuuid=validation-fixture-puuid returned a ready two-team payload with the current player marked, and /api/match-details?matchId=VALIDATION_FALLBACK_002&userPuuid=validation-fixture-puuid returned the truthful unavailable fallback payload.

evidence.consoleErrors: No browser console was available because this validation used the mission-approved tests-plus-dev-server-evidence fallback instead of agent-browser.
evidence.network: curl /api/account?gameName=Validation%20Fixture&tagLine=LOCAL -> 200 fixture account; curl /api/stored-matches?puuid=validation-fixture-puuid&offset=0&limit=20 -> 200 with two enriched fixture cards; curl /api/match-details?matchId=VALIDATION_READY_001&userPuuid=validation-fixture-puuid -> 200 ready details; curl /api/match-details?matchId=VALIDATION_FALLBACK_002&userPuuid=validation-fixture-puuid -> 200 unavailable fallback; HEAD /player/Validation%20Fixture#LOCAL -> 200.
evidence.terminal: pnpm test lib/validation-fixture.test.ts app/api/match-details/route.test.ts -> 2 files passed, 6 tests passed; runtime evidence confirms the deterministic fixture is wired through the same live account, stored-matches, player-route, and match-details paths used by the dashboard.

frictions.resolution: Used the mission-approved fallback: focused Vitest coverage, source inspection, and local dev-server/API evidence.

frictions.description: Direct browser screenshots and console capture remained unavailable because agent-browser is still blocked on this host.
frictions.resolution: Used the deterministic Validation Fixture runtime path plus focused fixture tests and dev-server HTTP evidence to complete the approved fallback proof for VAL-CROSS-001.

evidenceSummary.focusedTests: pnpm test lib/validation-fixture.test.ts app/api/match-details/route.test.ts -> 6/6 tests passed.
apiEvidence: curl "http://127.0.0.1:3005/api/stored-matches?puuid=validation-fixture-puuid&offset=0&limit=20" -> 200 with two enriched fixture cards

summary: Validated six assigned assertions using the approved Windows fallback. VAL-MATCH-001 through VAL-MATCH-005 remain supported by focused automated coverage plus dev-server/source evidence, and VAL-CROSS-001 now passes because the deterministic Validation Fixture proves the search/account -> player route -> enriched cards -> ready details/fallback details flow through the live runtime paths without relying on unstable live Riot data.
